doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: It misstates the Jones v. DeSantis outcome and announces an LFO policy reversal that Florida's Division of Elections has not issued.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This contradicts known Florida law (Jones v. DeSantis upheld the LFO requirement, not invalidated it) and references a fictitious case posture and memo number; no such Division of Elections clarification exists.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: It misstates the Jones v. DeSantis outcome and announces an LFO policy reversal that Florida's Division of Elections has not issued.
